description: Take feminine dressing to a new level with these sandals from catwalk. The metallic leather straps give it an edgy feel. Team it with dainty skirts and tops for a very girly vibe. Upper Plastic thong style straps that end at the midfoot Soft plastic toe separator Padded synthetic leather footbed with branding Outsole TPU outsole with a circular lug acting as a heel shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
